targets.label: Fig. 2 - generalized exclusion statistics {d_n} (left) and free-particle thermal occupation <n>_beta (right); species fermion, boson, Ex.2 m=2, Ex.3 m=2, Ex.4 m=3

feature_match.reason: Both panels reproduced feature-for-feature. Left: fermion ladder {0,1}, boson full tower, Ex.2 {0,1,2}, Ex.3 {0,1}, Ex.4 {0,1,2} with dash width encoding d_1=2,2,3 respectively - matches the source. Right: fermion and Ex.3 saturate to 1, Ex.2 and Ex.4 to 2, boson diverges at beta*eps->0+, all curves cross at the paper's values (fermion 1/2, Ex.3 2/3, Ex.2/Ex.4 1 at beta*eps=0).

numeric_closeness.reason: Curves are the identical closed-form functions the paper plots (d_n = Taylor coeffs of z_R; <n> = x z'/z), so the match is analytic, not merely visual. Limit values verified to 1e-9 and all d_n integers exact (outputs/checks/fig2.json). No author data table exists for a pointwise residual.

paper_scope_coverage.reason: Both panels at the published figure-legend parameters (Ex.2 m=2, Ex.3 m=2, Ex.4 m=3) over the paper's beta*eps in [-4,4].

targets.remaining_gap: Nature figure is raster-only (no author data / table); the comparison is analytic-to-analytic against the paper's own formulas, matched exactly, plus a structural visual overlay. Main-text prose says m=5 but the figure legend (reproduced here) uses m=2/3.

panels.note: thermal occupation <n>_beta vs beta*eps, same 5 species

targets.label: 1D exactly-solvable spin model (Ex.3, Eq. Hamil1Dspin) exact-diagonalization: many-body spectrum = free-paraparticle spectrum sum_{k in S} eps_k with multiplicity m^{|S|}; validates emergent free paraparticles and z_R=1+m x

feature_match.reason: Brute-force ED of the local spin chain reproduces exactly the free-paraparticle level structure: energies sum_{k in S} eps_k with multiplicity m^{|S|}, Hilbert dimension (m+1)^N, and conserved paraparticle number [H,n]=0. Directly demonstrates the paper's central claim that free paraparticles emerge as quasiparticles.

numeric_closeness.reason: Max spectrum deviation ~1e-14 (machine precision) across N=4,5 (m=2) and N=4 (m=3); commutator [H,n] identically 0. outputs/checks/ed_validation.json.

paper_scope_coverage.reason: Model, R-matrix, on-site operators and Hamiltonian reproduced exactly; chain length N is an illustrative choice (the paper fixes no figure-level N), and only the 1D Ex.3 case is diagonalized (not the 2D KDH model).

targets.remaining_gap: Only the 1D Ex.3 model is exact-diagonalized on small chains; the 2D solvable KDH model and its braiding (Methods) are not attempted. This target validates the physics behind Fig. 2 rather than a printed figure.

panels.note: ED spectrum == free-paraparticle prediction, mult m^{|S|}; [H,n]=0
